message.content:
你是架構設計 agent（simplicity-first 視角）：簡單優先：資深工程師視角，砍掉一切非必要抽象，KISS/YAGNI。
需求：「【任務】讓 SlotReels 的「掉落舊盤面出畫面」(DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen) 改為「等 GameView.ShowBigAwardHint(大獎預告) 結束後才播」，採方案 A（拆分職責 + path-aware 觸發點），範圍涵蓋「一般遊戲 + 免費遊戲(FG)」兩條路徑。

【已查證的承重事實 — 設計必須以此為前提，勿重新假設】

1. promise 身兼兩職（核心耦合）：`m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise`（SlotReels.ts L206 宣告）同時是
   (a) 掉落動畫的完成 handle，(b)「掉落模式凍結旗標」——`Spin(dt)` L1274 `if (this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise || this.m_isStop) return` 靠它非 null 來凍結轉輪更新迴圈（SpinAll），避免舊盤面被帶動。
   → 方案 A 核心：新增獨立 `m_isInDropMode: boolean` 承擔凍結職責(改 L1274 判定)，把 promise 釋放成純動畫 handle，才能延後建立 promise 而不讓舊盤面在預告期間解凍亂動。

2. 觸發點現況：掉落在 `SlotReels.StartSpin()` L943 `this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise = this.DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen()` 立即觸發（玩家點擊/伺服器回應前）。

3. drop-in 消費點：`DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo()` (SlotReels.ts L1953，內含 L1955 `await this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise`)，由 `SetPlateInfo()` L1701→L1713 觸發(fire-and-forget 非 await)，`SetPlateInfo` 來自 `GameView.SetNowRoundInfo()` L1768。

4. ⚠️ 兩條路徑相對 ShowBigAwardHint 順序「相反」(已驗證，是設計關鍵地雷)：
   - 一般遊戲 GameView.OnRecvSpinAck：L1642 `await ShowBigAwardHint()` 先 → L1664 `SetNowRoundInfo`(→drop-in await) 後。A 在此乾淨：把掉落觸發從 L943 移到 L1642 之後，drop-in await 自然接上。
   - 免費遊戲 SpinState.OnEnter (L41-58)：L38 StartSpin(現觸發掉落) → L43 `SetNowRoundInfo`(→drop-in await) → L46 `await ShowBigAwardHint()`。順序反過來，預告在 drop-in 之後。若把掉落觸發無腦延到「預告之後」，FG 的 drop-in await(L43) 會 `await null` 立即放行不等待 → drop-in 先跑、掉落動畫後補 → 視覺衝突(非卡死)。FG 必須 path-aware 重排 L43/L46 順序或另想協調。
   - ShowBigAwardHint 實作：GameView L2199，`CheckBigAwardHint` false 時幾乎立即返回(常態)。

5. 另有 unshow 路徑 SpinState L29-34：StartSpin(L32)→OnRecvSpinAck(L33,isUnshow=true)→同樣走 L1642 hint→L1664。需一併確認不被破壞。
   另有 OnRecvSpinAck_Test (GameView L1693) 不呼叫 ShowBigAwardHint，需確認測試路徑。

【死鎖/競態硬約束 — 設計必須證明每條路徑都成立】
掉落 promise 在 L1955 被 await。每個會觸發 drop-in(SetNowRoundInfo→SetPlateInfo)的路徑，其掉落 promise 必須在 drop-in await 之前已被建立(否則 await null 不等待→競態) 且最終會 resolve(否則卡死)。需窮舉 normal / FG / unshow / hardstop / autospin 各組合證明無卡死無競態。

【UX 既定代價(已與用戶確認接受方向)】一般遊戲下掉落改到伺服器回應+預告之後，1.5s 掉落不再與網路等待重疊；FG 同理。這是需求本身決定，非缺陷，但設計需明列。

【限制】禁止改動 extensions/astarte-framework 公版(roundController 等)，一律從專案層 assets/Script 達成。TypeScript，驗證指令 npx tsc --noEmit。

請產出含 BC-x 行為契約的設計規格，重點對抗驗證 FG path-aware 協調的死鎖/競態正確性。」
探索結果：{"existingArchitecture":"Brownfield — UK 老虎機 Cocos Creator 3.6.2 / TypeScript。掉落子系統三個承重元件全在專案層 assets/Script（非公版 framework）。\n\n1. SlotReels.ts（轉輪核心）\n- m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise (L206)：唯一賦值點=StartSpin() L943；唯一 null 點=DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo() L1964。身兼「動畫 handle」+「凍結旗標」雙職（Spin() L1274 `if (this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise || this.m_isStop) return`）。\n- m_isStop (L307)：另一凍結來源，Spin() L1268 IsStop getter 也先擋一次（L1268-1271，與 L1274 並存）；於 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo L1965 設 true。\n- StartSpin() L853-944：重置時間/狀態後 L943 立即觸發掉落（玩家點擊/server 回應前）。由 GameView.StartSpin() L1566 唯一呼叫。\n- DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo() L1953：L1955 await drop promise → L1961 重設位置 → L1963 await 新盤面落下 → L1964 promise=null → L1965 m_isStop=true。drop-in 消費點。\n- SetPlateInfo() L1701：L1711 `if (!this.m_gameView.IsMgOmen)` → L1713 fire-and-forget 觸發 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo（非 await）。\n\n2. GameView.ts（流程編排）\n- StartSpin() L1562 → SlotReels.StartSpin() L1566（掉落觸發鏈起點）。\n- OnRecvSpinAck() L1628（真正網路入口，由 L1069 網路 handler 呼叫）：L1642 `await ShowBigAwardHint` 先 → L1664 SetNowRoundInfo 後。一般遊戲路徑。\n- SetNowRoundInfo() L1756 → L1768 SlotReels.SetPlateInfo()（drop-in 觸發）。3 個呼叫者：OnRecvSpinAck L1664、OnRecvSpinAck_Test L1723、SpinState L43。\n- ShowBigAwardHint() L2199：CheckBigAwardHint false（常態）→ 幾乎立即返回；true → await PlayBigAwardEffect() (L2204，時長待測)。\n\n3. SpinState.ts（狀態機進入點）\n- OnEnter() L19：L25 roundController.StartSpin（公版，禁改）→ unshow 分支 L32 StartSpin + L33 OnRecvSpinAck(isUnshow=true) / normal 分支 L38 StartSpin → FG 分支(L41 IsFreeGame) L43 SetNowRoundInfo → L46 await ShowBigAwardHint。FG 順序與一般遊戲相反（drop-in 在 hint 前）。\n- OnProcess() L76 每幀呼叫 SlotReels.Spin(dt) 驅動凍結判定。\n\nautospin 透過同一 SpinState.OnEnter 重入，走相同 StartSpin/OnRecvSpinAck 路徑，無獨立掉落/promise 排序。","constraints":["禁改公版 extensions/astarte-framework（roundController.StartSpin SpinState L25、BaseState、Managers、utilis 全公版）；一律從專案層 assets/Script 達成","TypeScript，驗證指令 npx tsc --noEmit","命名規則：類別/函式 UpperCamel、變數 lowerCamel、私有成員 m_ 前綴、Creator 綁定物件 a_ 前綴","凍結職責現由 promise 非 null 與 m_isStop 兩者共同承擔（Spin L1268 + L1274）；新增 m_isInDropMode 必須同時覆蓋這兩道判定的語意，不可只改 L1274 而遺漏 L1268 的 IsStop getter 路徑","掉落 promise 在 drop-in（L1955）被 await：任何觸發 drop-in 的路徑，其掉落 promise 必須在 drop-in await 之前已建立（否則 await null 不等待→競態）且最終 resolve（否則卡死）"],"unknowns":["PlayBigAwardEffect() (GameView L2204) 的實際時長與 CheckBigAwardHint 為 true 的觸發頻率未查（task 說常態 false 近即返回，但 true 時掉落延後的時長代價未量化）","方案 A 對 FG path-aware 協調的具體手法未由需求指定：是『重排 SpinState L43/L46 順序（先 await hint 再 SetNowRoundInfo）』還是『另設協調點』——兩者皆觸碰 SpinState（專案層可改），但重排是否影響 FG 其他副作用（如 L44 SET_REMAINING_ROUND 事件、L49 IsHardStop 分支時序）未驗證","IsMgOmen 為 true 時 SetPlateInfo L1711 跳過 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo → 掉落 promise 永不被消費/null。現況 MgOmen 是否也跳過 L943 掉落觸發？若否，凍結旗標（promise 或新 m_isInDropMode）將永久卡住 → 需設計明確處理 MgOmen 分支的凍結解除","新觸發點移到 OnRecvSpinAck L1642 之後時，原 L943 觸發是否需完全移除、或保留給某些路徑（unshow/MgOmen）未定。unshow 走 L1642 hint→L1664（與 normal 同），理論上一致，但需確認 isUnshow=true 時 ShowBigAwardHint 行為（用 RoundQueue[0]）是否與 SetNowRoundInfo 用 CurRoundIndex 一致","ClickStopBtn()（hardstop，SlotReels L1224）只在 StopTime !== 0 時生效；掉落延後期間 StopTime 是否已設、hardstop 點擊是否落空或需特別處理未驗證","autospin 連續局之間，前一局 promise 在 L1964 null 的時機 vs 下一局 L943 重新賦值的時序，在掉落觸發點移動後是否仍無重疊未正面證明（需窮舉驗證）"],"factClaims":["A級 m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise 宣告於 SlotReels.ts L206，唯一賦值 L943、唯一 null L1964（grep 全專案僅此三處 + L1955 await）","A級 Spin() 凍結判定有兩道：L1268 `if (this.IsStop) return` + L1274 `if (this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise || this.m_isStop) return`。task 只提 L1274，L1268 IsStop getter（L310 return m_isStop）為新發現的並存凍結點，方案 A 改判定須一併考慮","A級 掉落立即觸發於 SlotReels.StartSpin() L943，該函式僅由 GameView.StartSpin() L1566 呼叫；GameView.StartSpin 由 SpinState L32（unshow）+ L38（normal/FG）呼叫","A級 drop-in 消費點 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo L1953-1967，L1955 await promise、L1964 null、L1965 m_isStop=true；由 SetPlateInfo L1713 fire-and-forget 觸發","A級 一般遊戲 OnRecvSpinAck L1642 await ShowBigAwardHint 先於 L1664 SetNowRoundInfo（→drop-in），順序與 task 述一致（task 行號 L1642/L1664/L1768 全部精確命中）","A級 FG SpinState L38 StartSpin（現觸發掉落）→ L43 SetNowRoundInfo（drop-in）→ L46 await ShowBigAwardHint，順序與一般遊戲相反，task 述一致","A級 ShowBigAwardHint L2199：CheckBigAwardHint false 時不 await（near-instant），true 時 await PlayBigAwardEffect()","B級+反例通過 OnRecvSpinAck_Test (GameView L1693) 呼叫者=0（grep 全 assets 僅見定義，無呼叫點）。反例：若有活躍呼叫應在某 state/handler 出現→實際 grep 僅 L1693 定義行→判定為 dead/test code，不在任何活躍路徑。task 對它的疑慮可降級（仍建議設計時不破壞，但非死鎖/競態風險路徑）","A級 SetNowRoundInfo（GameView L1756）呼叫者=3：OnRecvSpinAck L1664、OnRecvSpinAck_Test L1723、SpinState L43。其中 L1723 屬 dead path","A級 IsMgOmen 為 true 時 SetPlateInfo L1711-1714 跳過 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo → drop-in 不執行 → promise 不被消費也不 null（新發現的凍結旗標潛在卡死分支，task 未列）","B級 autospin 無獨立掉落路徑：grep 顯示 autospin 相關在 SpinState/AwardState/RoundEndState/EnterFreeState，掉落觸發鏈唯一經 SpinState.OnEnter→StartSpin，autospin 為同路徑重入。反例：若 autospin 有獨立 spin 觸發應見額外 StartSpin 呼叫→未發現→判定同路徑","A級 roundController.StartSpin（SpinState L25）為公版 db://astarte-framework/utilis import，禁改，與本案 SlotReels.StartSpin 同名不同物"]}
產出一個完整架構方案：核心取向 / 模組與職責 / BC-x 行為契約（≥ 2，可驗證）/ 取捨與風險 / 因果鏈觸及的既有連動點。

【承重核要求 — 必須遵守】
1. 事實求證（認知驗證）：任何「X 是 Y / 系統現在如何」的事實斷言，先分級證據：
   🟢 A 級（檔:行原文）/ 🟡 B 級（間接）/ 🔴 反例檢查（若真應見X·若假應見Y·實際Z）。
   只有 A 級或 B 級+反例通過才可當設計前提；弱證據必須標「待驗證」，不可當既成事實設計。
2. 因果鏈（依賴影響）：設計觸及既有程式碼時，標出受影響的連動點（grep 呼叫者窮舉），
   呼叫者=0 的修改點要警示（可能有 inline 繞過）。
3. 誠實邊界：不確定就說不確定，不要為了完整性編造需求未指定的設計選擇。

attachment.content:
- claude-mem-curate: 把 claude-mem 抽出的 shortlist 精選成少量繁體中文、去重後寫進 AIMemory。當使用者說「精選/整理 claude-mem」「把最近重點存記憶」,或每日自動 ingestion 時使用。
- dual-skill-review-loop: Use when producing any deliverable that needs quality assurance — writing, reports, proposals, code designs — and you want the output to reach ≥95 score through structured self-review iterations
- excel-to-ai-doc: Convert image-heavy Excel game spec spreadsheets (.xlsx) into an AI-readable knowledge structure — Markdown text + extracted original images (anchored to their source cells) + metadata.json. Use when the user wants to turn a 規格書/spec/design xlsx into something an AI or agent can read, asks to "convert this spec to markdown", "make this xlsx AI-readable", "extract images and tables from this spreadsheet for analysis", or needs to feed a slot/game spec workbook to a vision model. Triggers on game design specs, paytables, UI/flow screenshots embedded in .xlsx. NOT for clean tabular data exports (use a plain csv/markdown converter) or non-xlsx files.
- huashu-slides: AI演示文稿全流程制作：内容结构化→设计选型→AI插画/HTML构建→PPTX导出。17种实战验证的视觉风格（漫画/极简/数据叙事/国风），可编辑HTML与全AI视觉两条路径自由选择。当用户提到"做PPT"、"制作幻灯片"、"演示文稿"、"Keynote"、"slides"、"课件"、"汇报材料"、"路演"时使用。
- knowhow-accumulation: Use when capturing lessons from AI failures into structured ❌→✅ records, when reviewing past interactions to extract reusable patterns, or when building a self-improving knowledge base from repeated mistakes
- memory-to-skill: 當使用者要求「檢視 session 資料夾並把內容整理成 skill」、需要從過去對話中抽取可重用模式、或要把剛剛完成的工作經驗固化成 skill 時使用
- ms-agent-scheduled-prompts: 當需要為 LLM agent bridge（Telegram bot、Slack bot、CLI UI）做延遲 / 常態性 prompt 觸發、排程 bridge 指令（如每天凌晨 /restart）、或要在 agent 回覆裡嵌 token 讓使用者自助建排程時使用
- ms-agent-text-token-signaling: 當 LLM agent 需要觸發 host 端動作（傳檔、開網址、執行指令）但協定不允許 agent 端發起自訂 RPC、或想在 streaming 文字回覆中加上 side effect 又不破壞聊天 UX 時使用
- ms-kiro-strreplace-silent-fail: 當用 Kiro 的 strReplace 或 fs-edit 類工具改檔、tool 回報 Successfully replaced N occurrences 但事後 grep / read 發現磁碟內容沒變、或同一個檔案連續發幾個 strReplace 只有部分生效時使用
- ms-portable-skill-authoring: 當寫 skill 會被多個 agent CLI（Kiro / Codex / Claude）或多台機器共用、要避免把 F:\AI\AIMemory 或 ~/.kiro 這類絕對路徑寫死在 SKILL.md、或要讓 bridge 把環境差異注入成變數讓同一份 SKILL.md 跨機器重用時使用
- ms-streaming-token-pipeline: Use when a Telegram/Slack bot streams text via mid-turn edits plus a final render. Both paths must share one transform, or ASK buttons drop, half-tokens leak, and rate-limit recovery overwrites it.
- ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol: Use when emitting <<ASK:...>> for Telegram bridge buttons, or when an ASK token renders verbatim. Label soft cap 20 chars; >20 SHALL use numbered body list with short labels. See SKILL.md for limits.
- ms-telegram-bot-rate-limit-survival: 當 Telegram bot 對使用者 chat 串 streaming edit 或連發多則訊息、遇到 429 Too Many Requests / retry_after 愈累積愈長（60s→183s）、grammY autoRetry 超過 maxDelaySeconds 拋錯、或需要設計「限流期間凍結 UI + 限流結束後自動補發」時使用
- ms-windows-shell-exit-code-false-positive: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中跑 git clone、pip install、npm install、winget 等命令時，明明工作完成卻收到 exit code 1、stderr 有進度條或 notice、shell tool 回報失敗時使用
- ms-windows-shell-interactive-prompt: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中執行讀檔、列目錄、搜尋指令（Get-Content、type、cat、more）導致 tool call 卡住不回、或在 Kiro agent 與 ACP bridge 裡看到 PowerShell 的互動式參數詢問（例如 Path 參數提示）時使用
- non-engineer-agent-design: Use when designing Custom GPT / Claude Project / Gemini Gem instructions for non-engineers, or when helping someone structure their AI workflow using the 5-piece framework (Agent, Skill, Steering, Hook, KnowHow)
- self-eval-prompt-pattern: Use when designing prompts or instructions that require AI to self-assess quality before delivering output, when setting up automated quality gates in Custom GPT / Project / Gem instructions, or when AI outputs need measurable pass/fail criteria
- skill-creator: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
- sync-fork-from-upstream: 當使用者要把自己的 fork / 下游倉庫同步到原專案（upstream）的最新更新時使用。觸發語包含「同步原專案」「拿上游更新」「sync upstream」「更新原專案」「原本的倉庫有更新怎麼拉」。涵蓋一次性 upstream remote 設定、半自動同步流程（fetch → 拋棄式分支試合併 → 型別檢查 → 停在衝突/失敗、絕不自動 push）、以及 fork 與 upstream 無共同歷史時的「重新接血脈」做法。
- ui-ux-pro-max: ui-ux-pro-max
- uk-slot-extrabet: UK 老虎機 ExtraBet（額外押注/加倍投注）子系統指南。建立、修改、除錯 ExtraBet 功能，或處理 unshow/replay 還原、單倍率單步驟 / 多倍率兩步驟跳窗變體、多倍率 type 時觸發。涵蓋 framework ExtraBetComponent / extraBetController、專案 ExtraBetWindow 跳窗、ExtraBetEffectManager 動畫、SlotReels 假轉輪整合、GameView 整合多方關係。
- uk-slot-fake-reel-manager: FakeReelManager 假轉輪帶建立、修改、檢查或擴充
- uk-slot-multilang-sync: 把規格 xlsx 的多國語言文字批次同步進 uk 線上老虎機框架各語系的 gameStrings.xml。當使用者要在老虎機專案新增/更新多國語言字串、提到 「gameStrings.xml」「多國語言」「多語系文字」「i18n 字串」「把 xlsx 的翻譯填進去」、 或要為某個 Key 一次寫入多國(常見 26 國)文字時使用。僅適用線上部門 uk 框架 (plist 格式 gameStrings.xml、每語系一目錄、欄標題括號內為語系代碼); 商用部門或其他文字格式不適用。
- uk-slot-project-docs: uk-slot-project-docs
- uk-slot-state-machine: UK 老虎機狀態機設定，新增、移除或修改 SetStateMachine() 遊戲狀態時觸發。
- vc-kiro-delegate: 將實作任務委派給 Kiro CLI（headless mode + claude-opus-4.6）執行，把主 agent 的 Claude Max 5x 配額（5 小時 message cap）保留給協調與決策，把實作丟給 Kiro 的不限量訂閱算力。Claude Code 負責預估、規劃、light review；Kiro 負責具體實作與第一輪 self-review。當用戶說「用 kiro 做」「交給 kiro」「省 token」「叫 kiro 寫」時務必使用此 skill；當主 agent 自己評估某個任務「預估會花 2k+ tokens」時也要主動委派 — 例如新增函式、寫測試、重構函式、實作模組。即使用戶沒明說「kiro」，只要預估產出規模 ≥2k tokens，就主動委派並在訊息中告知預估值。
- writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- dev:init-claude: dev:init-claude — 開發設計閉環初始化
- sc:analyze: Comprehensive code analysis across quality, security, performance, and architecture domains
- sc:brainstorm: Interactive requirements discovery through Socratic dialogue and systematic exploration
- sc:build: Build, compile, and package projects with intelligent error handling and optimization
- sc:business-panel: /sc:business-panel - Business Panel Analysis System
- sc:cleanup: Systematically clean up code, remove dead code, and optimize project structure
- sc:design: Design system architecture, APIs, and component interfaces with comprehensive specifications
- sc:document: Generate focused documentation for components, functions, APIs, and features
- sc:estimate: Provide development estimates for tasks, features, or projects with intelligent analysis
- sc:explain: Provide clear explanations of code, concepts, and system behavior with educational clarity
- sc:git: Git operations with intelligent commit messages and workflow optimization
- sc:help: List all available /sc commands and their functionality
- sc:implement: Feature and code implementation with intelligent persona activation and MCP integration
- sc:improve: Apply systematic improvements to code quality, performance, and maintainability
- sc:index: Generate comprehensive project documentation and knowledge base with intelligent organization
- sc:load: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for project context loading
- sc:reflect: Task reflection and validation using Serena MCP analysis capabilities
- sc:save: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for session context persistence
- sc:select-tool: Intelligent MCP tool selection based on complexity scoring and operation analysis
- sc:spawn: Meta-system task orchestration with intelligent breakdown and delegation
- sc:spec-panel: Multi-expert specification review and improvement using renowned specification and software engineering experts
- sc:task: Execute complex tasks with intelligent workflow management and delegation
- sc:test: Execute tests with coverage analysis and automated quality reporting
- sc:troubleshoot: Diagnose and resolve issues in code, builds, deployments, and system behavior
- sc:workflow: Generate structured implementation workflows from PRDs and feature requirements
- uk-conventions: 把 UK 老虎機開發規範（禁改公版 + 命名規則）寫入當前專案的 CLAUDE.md（冪等，不重複貼）
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dev-design: 架構設計 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 1+1b）：多方案 judge-panel → 對抗驗證砍缺陷 → 設計規格（含 BC-x）。承重核（因果鏈+事實求證）注入每個 agent。
- dev-prd: PRD / 需求探索 workflow（新能力，原方法論無 PRD 階段）：多角度需求探索（problem/user/scope）→ 塑形候選（lean/complete）→ 對抗挑戰 → PRD 文件。事實求證確保需求前提不是憑空假設。
- dev-review: 品質+安全審查 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 3）：parallel 多視角審查（correctness/security/repro lens）→ 對抗驗證 findings。異源 skeptic 打破同源自審天花板（#007）。
- dev-verify: 跨產出物自證 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 5，可選）：可枚舉項用 adversarial-verify；反向遍歷（找死碼/未實作）用輕量 verifier agent（這是 adversarial-verify 結構上蓋不到的缺口）。
- claude-md-management:revise-claude-md: Update CLAUDE.md with learnings from this session
- claude-mem:do: Execute a plan using subagents for implementation
- claude-mem:make-plan: Create an implementation plan with documentation discovery
- codex:rescue: Delegate investigation, an explicit fix request, or follow-up rescue work to the Codex rescue subagent
- codex:setup: Check whether the local Codex CLI is ready and optionally toggle the stop-time review gate
- webwright:craft: Craft a reusable Webwright CLI tool by parameterizing a web task.
- webwright:run: Run a one-shot web task with the Webwright Playwright workflow.
- claude-md-management:claude-md-improver: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files in repositories. Use when user asks to check, audit, update, improve, or fix CLAUDE.md files. Scans for all CLAUDE.md files, evaluates quality against templates, outputs quality report, then makes targeted updates. Also use when the user mentions "CLAUDE.md maintenance" or "project memory optimization".
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup
- superpowers:receiving-code-review: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
- superpowers:requesting-code-review: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
- superpowers:systematic-debugging: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
- superpowers:test-driven-development: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - ensures an isolated workspace exists via native tools or git worktree fallback
- superpowers:using-superpowers: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring skill invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
- superpowers:verification-before-completion: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
- superpowers:writing-plans: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
- superpowers:writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- claude-mem:mem-search: Search claude-mem's persistent cross-session memory database. Use when user asks "did we already solve this?", "how did we do X last time?", or needs work from previous sessions.
- telegram:access: Manage Telegram channel access — approve pairings, edit allowlists, set DM/group policy. Use when the user asks to pair, approve someone, check who's allowed, or change policy for the Telegram channel.
- telegram:configure: Set up the Telegram channel — save the bot token and review access policy. Use when the user pastes a Telegram bot token, asks to configure Telegram, asks "how do I set this up" or "who can reach me," or wants to check channel status.
- codex:codex-cli-runtime: Internal helper contract for calling the codex-companion runtime from Claude Code
- codex:codex-result-handling: Internal guidance for presenting Codex helper output back to the user
- codex:gpt-5-4-prompting: Internal guidance for composing Codex and GPT-5.4 prompts for coding, review, diagnosis, and research tasks inside the Codex Claude Code plugin
- webwright:webwright: Solve a user-specified web task code-as-action style by driving a local Playwright browser through one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into `final_runs/run_<id>/`, and visually verifying the result. Use when the user asks to automate a web task (search, filter, form-fill, multi-step flow, data extraction) and wants reusable scripts plus screenshot evidence rather than a one-shot answer.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content: assets\Script\GameView.ts
assets\Script\SlotReels.ts
assets\Script\GameState\SpinState.ts

content.text: The探索 facts are confirmed at exact lines. Now let me verify the key path-aware code: GameView.OnRecvSpinAck, SetNowRoundInfo, SetPlateInfo, and SpinState.OnEnter.
All探索 facts verified at exact lines. Now I understand the full picture. Let me check the SetPlateInfo / IsMgOmen branch and ShowBigAwardHint to confirm the MgOmen卡死 concern and the timing.

All facts verified. I now have everything I need. Let me check one critical thing: in FG path, does `IsMgOmen` apply? And what is the MgOmen flow for triggering掉落. Let me grep IsMgOmen usage and confirm the current MgOmen behavior regarding StartSpin.

content.content: No matches found

content.text: IsMgOmen setter has no caller assignment via `=` (it's a property setter, so assignments would be `this.IsMgOmen = ...`). Let me check actual assignment sites.

IsMgOmen is never assigned `true` anywhere in the project layer — so `m_isMgOmen` stays `false` constant (default). It may be set from framework, but探索 already flagged this as a潛在 edge case. Since it's never set to true in the project layer that I can find, the MgOmen branch (L1711 skip) is currently dormant — but I should not assume it never activates (framework could set it). I'll treat MgOmen defensively in BC.

I now have full verified understanding. Let me produce the design.

Key insight for the FG path-aware coordination: The cleanest, simplest approach (KISS/YAGNI) is to **delay the drop trigger to a single new method `TriggerDropOut()` on SlotReels**, and call it at the path-correct point in each path:
- Normal (OnRecvSpinAck): call after L1642 ShowBigAwardHint, before L1664 SetNowRoundInfo.
- FG (SpinState): call after L46 ShowBigAwardHint, but FG currently does SetNowRoundInfo (L43) BEFORE hint (L46). So FG must reorder: move L43 SetNowRoundInfo to after L46 hint, then call TriggerDropOut before it.

But reordering SetNowRoundInfo in FG affects L44 SET_REMAINING_ROUND event timing. Simpler alternative: in FG, call `TriggerDropOut()` BEFORE L43, then `await ShowBigAwardHint` — but that defeats the purpose (drop would overlap hint). The requirement is drop AFTER hint. So FG must: hint first, then trigger drop, then drop-in. That requires moving SetNowRoundInfo after hint.

Let me decide on the minimal-surface design and write it up.

input.approach: 方案A最小手術版：把「凍結職責」從 promise 拆出成獨立 boolean `m_isInDropMode`，promise 降格為純動畫 handle 並可延後建立；掉落觸發從 StartSpin 內聯改為 SlotReels 新增的顯式方法 `TriggerDropOut()`，由各路徑在「ShowBigAwardHint 之後、drop-in 之前」呼叫。FG 因原順序相反（drop-in 在 hint 前），path-aware 處理＝在 SpinState 內把 SetNowRoundInfo 移到 hint 之後並在其前插入 TriggerDropOut，使「建立 promise → await promise」的因果序在每條路徑都成立。不引入新協調器、不改公版、不動 Spin 迴圈結構（僅換凍結判定來源）。
modules: SlotReels.ts（轉輪核心）：① 新增 private m_isInDropMode:boolean（凍結旗標，承接原 promise 非 null 的凍結語意）② 新增 public TriggerDropOut():void —— 設 m_isInDropMode=true 並建立 m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise=this.DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen()，含 re-entrancy guard（已在 drop mode 則 no-op）③ StartSpin() L943 移除內聯掉落觸發（promise 不在此建立）④ Spin() L1274 凍結判定由 `m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise` 改為 `m_isInDropMode`（L1268 IsStop getter 維持不變，與 m_isStop 語意一致無需動）⑤ DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo() L1955 await 後、L1964 promise=null 同時 m_isInDropMode=false（凍結解除與動畫 handle 釋放綁同點）⑥ DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo 開頭加守衛：promise 為 null（未觸發 drop-out）時直接走重設+落下，不 await null

GameView.ts（一般遊戲編排）：OnRecvSpinAck() 在 L1642 `await ShowBigAwardHint` 之後、L1664 SetNowRoundInfo 之前插入 `this.m_slotReels.TriggerDropOut()`。unshow 走同一函式故同步受惠。OnRecvSpinAck_Test（dead path，呼叫者=0）不動但需 tsc 通過。

SpinState.ts（FG 路徑重排）：OnEnter() FG 分支把 L43 SetNowRoundInfo 移到 L46 `await ShowBigAwardHint` 之後；在移後的 SetNowRoundInfo 之前插入 `this.m_gameView.SlotReels.TriggerDropOut()`。L44 SET_REMAINING_ROUND 事件改用區域變數 thisRoundInfo（不依賴 SetNowRoundInfo 副作用）保持原 round 資料，避免時序副作用。
behaviorContracts: BC-1（凍結語意等價·[framework-dependent]）：掉落觸發後到 drop-in 完成前，Spin(dt) 不得推進轉輪帶（SpinAll 不執行）。驗證：m_isInDropMode 在 TriggerDropOut 設 true、DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo 落下完成才設 false；此區間 Spin() L1274 必 return。等價基準＝原 promise 非 null 期間。

BC-2（normal 無競態·[testable 邏輯序]）：一般遊戲路徑 TriggerDropOut（建立 promise）必先於 SetNowRoundInfo→SetPlateInfo→DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo 的 L1955 await。驗證：OnRecvSpinAck 內 TriggerDropOut 在 SetNowRoundInfo 之前同步呼叫，await null 不可能發生。

BC-3（FG 無競態無視覺衝突·[testable 邏輯序]）：FG 路徑掉落 promise 建立（TriggerDropOut）必先於 SetNowRoundInfo（drop-in 觸發），且 hint 完成才觸發掉落。驗證：SpinState FG 分支序為 await ShowBigAwardHint → TriggerDropOut → SetNowRoundInfo。重排後 drop-in 的 await 等到的是已建立且會 resolve 的 promise，非 null。

BC-4（無卡死·[testable]）：凡呼叫 TriggerDropOut 的路徑，其 promise 最終必 resolve 且 m_isInDropMode 必歸 false。驗證：DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen 動畫完成 resolve promise；DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo L1964 區同時清 promise+旗標。窮舉 normal/FG/unshow/hardstop/autospin 皆經 SetPlateInfo→DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo 消費。

BC-5（MgOmen 不永久凍結·[framework-dependent 待驗證]）：若 IsMgOmen 為 true（SetPlateInfo L1711 跳過 drop-in，promise 永不消費），TriggerDropOut 不得在此路徑被呼叫，或 drop mode 必有替代解除。驗證：IsMgOmen 路徑不呼叫 TriggerDropOut（保持 m_isInDropMode=false）。註：專案層查無 IsMgOmen=true 賦值點，旗標目前恆 false，此 BC 為防禦性契約。

BC-6（hardstop 行為不退化·[framework-dependent]）：掉落延後期間 ClickStopBtn（StopTime!==0 才生效）行為不被破壞。驗證：TriggerDropOut 不改 StopTime；hardstop 分支（OnRecvSpinAck L1669 / SpinState L49）仍在 SetNowRoundInfo 之後執行，時序相對掉落觸發不變。
input.tradeoffs: 取捨：① 雙真相來源風險——拆出 m_isInDropMode 後，凍結語意由「promise 非 null」改為獨立 boolean，若未來有人只清 promise 忘了清旗標會卡死；緩解＝兩者在 DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo L1964 同一點綁定釋放，並在 TriggerDropOut 同一點綁定設定。② FG 重排 SetNowRoundInfo 是行為時序變更，SET_REMAINING_ROUND 與 WANTED_POSTER 事件 dispatch 時點延後到 hint 之後；已用區域變數隔離 round 資料避免取值錯誤，但若有其他訂閱者依賴 SetNowRoundInfo 在 hint 前完成（探索未窮舉），為殘留風險。③ UX 既定代價：一般遊戲掉落改到 server 回應+預告後，1.5s 不再與網路等待重疊（需求決定，非缺陷）。最大風險＝FG SetNowRoundInfo 重排的隱性副作用 + MgOmen 旗標雖現為 dormant 但屬 framework 可控的未驗證分支。
rippleImpact: SlotReels.StartSpin() L943（A級·唯一呼叫者 GameView.StartSpin L1566）：移除內聯掉落觸發。影響＝所有經 StartSpin 的路徑（normal/FG/unshow）不再於此建立 promise，凍結需靠新 TriggerDropOut 補回，否則掉落消失。連動必改。
SlotReels.Spin() L1274（A級）：凍結判定改 m_isInDropMode。並存的 L1268 IsStop getter（return m_isStop）語意不同（停輪 vs 掉落）維持不動。漏改 L1274 會導致掉落期間舊盤面被 SpinAll 帶動。

SlotReels.DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo() L1955/L1964（A級·唯一 promise null 點，由 SetPlateInfo L1713 fire-and-forget 觸發）：L1955 await 前需容忍 promise=null（守衛）；L1964 區追加 m_isInDropMode=false。drop-in 消費點，所有路徑收斂於此。

GameView.OnRecvSpinAck L1642/L1664（A級·網路入口，由 L1069 handler 呼叫）：兩行間插入 TriggerDropOut。normal+unshow 共用，unshow（isUnshow=true 用 RoundQueue[0]）自動受惠，需確認 hint 與 SetNowRoundInfo 用同一 round 索引（探索標 unknown，建議實作時對齊）。
SpinState.OnEnter L43/L46（A級·FG 分支）：SetNowRoundInfo 與 ShowBigAwardHint 互換順序 + 插入 TriggerDropOut。連動 L44 SET_REMAINING_ROUND（改用區域變數）。autospin 經同一 OnEnter 重入無獨立路徑，受同一重排覆蓋。
SetNowRoundInfo L1756（A級·呼叫者=3：OnRecvSpinAck L1664 / OnRecvSpinAck_Test L1723【dead·呼叫者=0】/ SpinState L43）：dispatch WANTED_POSTER + 觸發 SetPlateInfo。FG 路徑此呼叫時點延後，須確認 m_roundInfo 無被 hint 期間其他邏輯讀取的競態。
IsMgOmen L1711（A級·SetPlateInfo 內 drop-in 開關；專案層查無 =true 賦值，恆 false dormant）：TriggerDropOut 須避開此分支以防凍結旗標永久卡住。屬 framework 可控未驗證分支，BC-5 防禦。

content.content: Structured output provided successfully
